name: Vivid Seats Inc.
summary: Part I Overview We are an online ticket marketplace that utilizes our technology platform to connect fans of live events seamlessly with ticket sellers. We believe in the power of shared experiences to connect people with live events that deliver some of lifes most exciting moments, and our mission is to empower and enable fans to Experience It Live .
